ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "healthcare_system_type" TEXT /* Type of healthcare system */,
  "gdp_per_capita" TEXT /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "tests_cumulative" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of tests conducted */,
  "new_tests" INTEGER /* Number of new tests conducted on the given date */,
  "tests_cumulative_corrected" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of tests conducted (corrected) */,
  "new_tests_corrected" INTEGER /* Number of new tests conducted on the given date (corrected) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "positive_cases" INTEGER /* Number of positive cases on the given date */,
  "positive_rate" TEXT /* Positive rate of the tests conducted */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of tests conducted */,
  "test_kit_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the test kits */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the tests were conducted */,
  "test_coverage" TEXT /* Coverage of the population tested */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the testing data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection (e.g., manual, selenium) */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data source (1-10) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source information was last updated */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source for reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the testing data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES testing_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, public health official, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the testing data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES testing_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., trend analysis, summary) */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_size" TEXT /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "report_duration" TEXT /* Time taken to generate the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
